summary_en: ¥42.50/share (up ¥2.50 from ¥40.00 prior forecast) for FY3/26 period-end dividend. Payout ratio target maintained at 35%. Policy change: adoption of progressive dividend principle from FY3/27 onwards to strengthen shareholder returns.
title_en: Notice of Dividend Forecast Revision (Dividend Increase) and Change in Dividend Policy (Introduction of Progressive Dividend)
translation_en_brief: FaithNetwork announced on May 15, 2026 a revision to its dividend forecast for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2026 and a change in dividend policy. The company raised the period-end dividend forecast from ¥40.00 per share to ¥42.50 per share, an increase of ¥2.50, based on recent earnings performance disclosed that day. The annual dividend is now projected at ¥42.50 per share (unchanged from the interim dividend of ¥0.00 disclosed earlier). Additionally, the company amended its dividend policy effective from fiscal year ending March 31, 2027 to introduce progressive dividend as a principle, while maintaining the target payout ratio of 35%. The policy change is intended to clarify the company's commitment to strengthening shareholder returns from the perspective of enhancing corporate value. Note: The company conducted a 1-for-3 stock split on October 1, 2025; prior-year figures are on a pre-split basis.
